title: Ambiguous Commitments Rejection

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions brainstorming and non-committal discussion regarding integration RFC and billing configuration
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Creating any active action items for 'might look at' or 'maybe we could' statements

scoringNotes: Verify that proposedActions is empty. Non-committal brainstorming must not generate tasks.
assumptions: Brainstorming/tentative statements are out of scope for action item generation.
